description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a metallic gray exterior and a front-hinged door that features a large, dark-tinted window for viewing the interior. The control panel is located on the right side of the front face and consists of two prominent circular dials, likely for setting time and power levels. The door opens outward from the left, and the handle is integrated along the right edge of the door, designed for easy gripping. Ventilation grilles are visible on the left side and the rear, ensuring proper airflow and heat dissipation. The microwave's interior is visible through the open door, revealing a simple, clean cavity suitable for heating food. There is a warning label on the rear panel, but no visible brand logo on any surface.
description: A compact, metallic gray microwave oven with a large front window, two control dials, and side/rear vents. The door opens outward, revealing a simple interior for heating food.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open door with a large window and a vent grille on the left panel.
description_view_1: Front angled view displaying the open door, two circular control dials on the right, and the interior cavity.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the open door and the control dials visible, but no vent on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a warning label and a vent grille, with the door partially open and no controls visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located vertically on the right side of the front face, featuring two large, circular dials stacked one above the other. There are no visible labels, digital displays, or additional buttons.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical, integrated strip along the right edge of the door, matching the door's metallic finish and designed for easy gripping. It is flush with the surface and does not protrude significantly.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are present on the left side panel as a rectangular grid of small holes and on the rear panel as a larger rectangular grille. Both are designed for airflow and heat dissipation.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, dark-tinted window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
